zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Percy II於1228年2月6日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親William de Percy36歲，母親Ellen Balliol22歲。他於1268年9月與Eleanor de Warenne在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年8月29日在英國越可爾克雷文享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Percy II于1228年2月6日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，他的父亲William de Percy36岁，母亲Ellen Balliol22岁。他于1268年9月与Eleanor de Warenne在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年8月29日在英国越可爾克雷文享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩利。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Percy II was born on 6 February 1228, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, his father, William de Percy, was 36 and his mother, Ellen Balliol, was 22. He married Eleanor de Warenne in September 1268, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 August 1272, in Craven, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Percy II est né le 6 février 1228, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William de Percy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ellen Balliol, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Warenne en septembre 1268, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 août 1272, à Craven, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Sawley, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Percy II am 6. Februar 1228 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Percy 36 und seine Mutter Ellen Balliol 22. Er hat im September 1268 in York, Yorkshire, England Eleanor de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. August 1272 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Craven, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sawley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Percy II è nato il il 6 febbraio 1228 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, William de Percy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Balliol, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Warenne nel settembre 1268, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 agosto 1272, nel Craven, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawley, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Percy IIが1228年2月6日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父William de Percyは36歳，母Ellen Balliolは22歳であった。1268年9月にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでEleanor de Warenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年8月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアクラベンで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Percy II(이)가 1228년 2월 6일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Percy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Balliol(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1268년 9월 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Eleanor de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 8월 29일 영국 요르크실르 크레이븐에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 사w리에 묻혔다.

pt.6 February 1228–29 August 1272: 6 de fevereiro de 1228–29 de agosto de 1272
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Percy II nasceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1228, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Percy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Balliol, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Warenne em setembro de 1268, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1272, em Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Percy II родился 6 февраля 1228 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Percy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Balliol, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Warenne сентябрь 1268 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 августа 1272 г. в местности кравен, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности савли, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.6 February 1228–29 August 1272: 6 de febrero de 1228–29 de agosto de 1272
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Percy II nació el 6 de febrero de 1228, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Percy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ellen Balliol, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Warenne en septiembre de 1268, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1272, en Craven, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Sawley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
